subcodes.first_line: O cherished handmaid of God! Our intention was to journey to Marseilles and Paris, yet circumstances were not favorable [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی ما را نیت چنان بود که بمرسیلیا و پاریس آایم ولی قدر مساعده
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @East and West; communication between East and West
